item.name: 20 Proven OpenClaw Workflows
item.subtitle: Copy-paste prompts for 20 real-world AI workflows, battle-tested over 50+ days of daily use
item.description:
A curated collection of 20 production-tested prompts for everyday AI assistant workflows — straight from @moritzkremb's 50-day OpenClaw review. Covers morning briefings, server monitoring, email triage (draft-only), YouTube analytics, deep multi-agent research, Obsidian vault search, smart home control, bookmark automation, Discord architecture, and more.

Every prompt is copy-paste ready. Adjust paths, API credentials, and personal details to match your setup. Most will work as-is, or your agent will ask clarifying questions.

Includes security rules for safe production use: draft-only email, prompt injection defense, Tailscale networking, least-privilege integrations, and approval gates for destructive actions.

Original Article: https://x.com/moritzkremb/status/2029304864719667335
item.readme_content:
